seo.og_title: 115 Lodgepole Cir, Lafayette, LA 70508 — For Sale $315,000
seo.og_description: Single-Family — 3 bed / 2 bath / 1,981 sq ft. Offered at $315,000. Presented by Carrie Billeaud, REALTOR®, eXp Realty.

copy.hero_tagline: A red-brick single-story retreat where hardwood, granite, and marble meet on a quiet Lafayette circle.
overview_paragraphs: Set behind mature trees on a landscaped lot, this single-story brick home opens through an arched entry into an open-concept interior defined by hardwood floors, white structural columns, and recessed lighting. A fireplace with a white mantle anchors the living room, where plantation-shuttered windows carry daylight across the main gathering spaces.

The kitchen pairs white cabinetry with granite countertops, stainless steel appliances, and an island counter, drawing natural light from an overhead skylight. Just beyond, a bright dining room framed by plantation-shutter windows looks out over the lawn, while glass doors open the living space onto a covered patio.

Three bedrooms include a master with a tray ceiling and plantation shutters, served by a bath finished in marble, dual gold-framed mirrors, and brass fixtures. With a two-car garage, dedicated laundry and utility rooms, and walk-in closets throughout, the plan balances everyday function with quiet, well-kept detail.
copy.pull_quote: Marble, brass, and hardwood, composed with restraint behind a landscaped brick facade.

feature_groups.title: Living & Entry
items: Arched entry with landscaped front lawn and mature trees
Foyer with hardwood flooring, arched doorway, transom window, and dual chandeliers
Open-concept living space with white structural columns and recessed lighting
Living room fireplace with white mantle and plantation-shuttered windows

feature_groups.title: Kitchen & Dining
items: White cabinetry with granite countertops and stainless steel appliances
Bright dining room with plantation-shutter windows overlooking the lawn

feature_groups.title: Bedrooms & Baths
items: Master bedroom with tray ceiling and plantation-shutter windows
Master bath with marble dual vanity, gold-framed mirrors, and brass sconces
Walk-in shower with marble surround and brass rainfall fixtures

location_paragraphs: Lodgepole Circle sits within a tree-lined suburban neighborhood in Lafayette, where manicured lawns and mature canopy line the surrounding streets. The 0.12-acre lot is enclosed by a wooden privacy fence, with a covered patio, mulched landscaping beds, and green lawn to the rear.

Local shopping is visible within the wider neighborhood, and the home's position on a circle keeps it set back from through traffic. Aerial perspectives show a peaked-roof brick home on a concrete driveway, framed by established trees.
location_points: Covered rear patio and mulched landscaping beds
Local shopping within the surrounding area
Single-story brick construction with peaked roof
copy.cta_sub: 115 Lodgepole Circle is available to tour by appointment. To see the home for yourself, contact Carrie Billeaud at eXp Realty — 337-258-5379.
